doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: ABA Model Rule 5.5 does not contain sections (b) and (c) as presented; the actual rule addresses multijurisdictional practice, not paralegal supervision in this detailed manner.
